scripts.generate: mkdir -p build && wget -O ./build/openapi.json https://api.eulerstream.com/dashboard/openapi && npx @openapitools/openapi-generator-cli generate -i ./build/openapi.json -g csharp -o ./src/generated --additional-properties=packageName=EulerApiSdk,targetFramework=net8.0,nullableReferenceTypes=true && tsx ./scripts/fix-enum-conflicts.ts && tsx ./scripts/render-template.ts
